entries.title: Acceptance and Evidence Reconciliation Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for the acceptance and evidence reconciliation flow that keeps acceptance contracts, validator expectations, validation evidence, and traceability joins aligned.

entries.title: Command Documentation and Lookup Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for a human-readable command-page family under docs/commands and a machine-readable command index under core/control_plane/indexes/commands.

entries.title: Compact Document Authoring and Tracking Design
entries.summary: Defines the design for making authored templates and generated planning trackers compact by default while preserving governed machine-readable authority.

entries.title: Core Export Hardening Design
entries.summary: Defines the follow-up architecture needed to make output-directory sync runs dependency-correct, restore accurate command implementation metadata, and tighten the public export-safe boundary around repo-specific services.

entries.title: Core Export-Ready Architecture Design
entries.summary: Defines the in-repo architecture needed to separate reusable core behavior from WatchTowerPlan repo-operations, reduce maintenance fan-out, and publish generic pack-facing contracts.

entries.title: Core Python Workspace and Harness Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level technical design for the consolidated Python workspace under core/python and the first functional boundaries of the core helper and harness package.

entries.title: Derived Projection Status Semantics Alignment Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Derived Projection Status Semantics Alignment.

entries.title: End-to-End Repository Rationalization Design
entries.summary: Defines the review-backed design for documentation link guardrails, closeout-consistent derived metadata, external pack validation seams, and smaller query CLI modules.

entries.title: Foundation Scope and EntryPoint Realignment Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the design for separating current repository scope from future product narrative and for keeping root entrypoints thin and explicit.

entries.title: GitHub Collaboration Scaffolding
entries.summary: Defines the hosted GitHub intake, pull request, and project-field scaffolding that complements the repo-local planning and task model.

entries.title: GitHub Task Push Sync
entries.summary: Defines the first push-only sync from local task records to GitHub issues and optional project items while preserving local task authority.

entries.title: Initiative Closeout and Planning Trackers
entries.summary: Defines the first initiative closeout model, its traceability fields, and the generated planning trackers that mirror initiative outcome for humans.

entries.title: Local Task Tracking and GitHub Sync Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level design for local-first task records, a generated task tracker, a generated task index, and later GitHub sync support.

entries.title: Machine-First Coordination Surface Design
entries.summary: Defines the derived coordination index and compact human byproduct needed to make one always-useful coordination surface the default start-here view for planning state.

entries.title: Planning Authority Unification Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the technical design for a canonical planning catalog, a machine authority map, and explicit planning-status semantics.

entries.title: Pre-Implementation Repository Readiness Design
entries.summary: Defines the review-backed design for compact documentation entrypoints, a clear machine coordination start-here path, and more modular configurable core package surfaces.

entries.title: Python Validator Execution Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level technical design for a Python validation layer that reads the authored validator registry from core/control_plane and executes validators deterministically against governed artifacts.

entries.title: Schema Resolution and Index Search Design
entries.summary: Defines the feature-level technical design for deterministic local schema resolution and index-backed repository search in the Python helper layer.

entries.title: Standard, Runtime, and Route Explicitness Hardening Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Standard, Runtime, and Route Explicitness Hardening.

entries.title: Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing Feature Design
entries.summary: Defines the technical design boundary for Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing.

entries.title: Workflow Routing and Authoring Design
entries.summary: Defines the architecture for executable route preview, governed workflow metadata, lean planning scaffolds, and task lifecycle commands.

entries.title: Control-Plane Loaders and SchemaStore Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the first executable core/python slice into concrete work for loading governed control-plane artifacts and resolving schemas locally through a reusable SchemaStore.
entries.notes: First executable slice for the core Python helper and harness layer.

entries.title: Core Export Hardening Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the export-hardening follow-up into bounded slices for output-directory sync consistency, command metadata repair, and public boundary cleanup.

entries.title: Core Export Readiness and Optimization Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the export-readiness architecture into concrete in-repo phases that isolate repo-ops, reduce maintenance fan-out, and publish generic pack-facing contracts without extracting the package yet.

entries.title: Derived Projection Status Semantics Alignment Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks Derived Projection Status Semantics Alignment into a bounded implementation slice.

entries.title: End-to-End Repository Rationalization Execution Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the final pre-implementation review follow-up into bounded slices for documentation guardrails, derived metadata hardening, external pack validation seams, and query CLI modularity.

entries.title: Foundation Scope and EntryPoint Realignment Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the foundation-scope and root-entrypoint cleanup into bounded documentation slices with one accepted scope decision and a traced acceptance baseline.

entries.title: Machine-First Coordination Surface Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the coordination-surface work into bounded slices for the coordination index, the generated human byproduct, and aligned planning entrypoint guidance.

entries.title: Planning Authority Unification Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the planning catalog, authority-map, and status-semantics work into bounded executable slices.

entries.title: Pre-Implementation Repository Hardening Execution Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the repository review remediation into bounded slices for README entrypoints, machine coordination, and core modularity plus supplemental schema loading.

entries.title: Standard, Runtime, and Route Explicitness Hardening Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks Standard, Runtime, and Route Explicitness Hardening into a bounded implementation slice.

entries.title: Template and Output Efficiency Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks the template and output efficiency initiative into compact authoring, tracker compaction, and workflow-guidance slices.

entries.title: Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing into a bounded implementation slice.

entries.title: Workflow System Operationalization Implementation Plan
entries.summary: Breaks workflow-system operationalization into bounded slices for route metadata, route preview, planning scaffolds, task lifecycle commands, and reconciliation guidance.
